hero.title: The Ultimate Anime & Manga Companion
hero.description: Your definitive companion for tracking anime and manga. Discover, track, and share your passion with a global community.

featuresSection.title: All-in-One Anime & Manga Tracker
featuresSection.description: AniTrend is packed with features to help you organize your lists, discover new favorites, and connect with other fans.

appShowcase.title: Beautifully Crafted Interface
appShowcase.description: Explore a meticulously designed interface that's both intuitive and visually stunning. Every screen is built to enhance your anime and manga journey.

integrations.title: Proudly Open Source
integrations.description: AniTrend is a passion project built by the community, for the community. Explore our repositories and contribute.

community.title: By the community, for the community
community.description: Thanks to our contributors, AniTrend is built on open collaboration and passion.

contribute.title: Create or contribute
contribute.description: Get involved by writing or maintaining a part of the AniTrend ecosystem.

modernTech.title: Modern Tech Stack
modernTech.description: Built on a robust foundation of Kotlin, GraphQL, and modern Android practices.

aiRecommender.title: Discover Your Next Favorite with AI
aiRecommender.description: Tired of endless scrolling? Describe what you're in the mood for, and let our AI find the perfect anime for you from a massive catalog of titles.

getTheApp.title: Take AniTrend Anywhere
getTheApp.description: Choose your preferred download method. Get the official release from Google Play or grab the latest build from GitHub.

googlePlay.title: Google Play
googlePlay.subtitle: Recommended for most users
googlePlay.description: Get the official, stable release from the Google Play Store. This version includes automatic updates to ensure you always have the latest features and bug fixes.

github.title: GitHub
github.subtitle: For developers & early adopters
github.description: Download the latest release directly from our GitHub repository. Ideal for those who want the newest builds or to contribute to the project.

community.title: Start Your Adventure
community.description: Join our community, support AniTrend, and dive into an incredible anime and manga experience!

stayInLoop.title: Stay in the Loop
stayInLoop.description: Track anime and manga trends effortlessly, and manage your lists from one unified space.

findExactlyWhatYouLove.title: Find Exactly What You Love
findExactlyWhatYouLove.description: Effortlessly search anime, manga, characters, and creators with our powerful search engine.

rateYourWay.title: Rate Your Way
rateYourWay.description: Personalize your experience with flexible rating systems tailored just for you.

smartAndEfficient.title: Smart and Efficient
smartAndEfficient.description: AniTrend intelligently adapts to your device's settings to optimize battery and data usage.
